overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dark urban alley at night, emerging into a neon-lit downtown plaza with tall corporate buildings and advertisements. The scene features classic cyberpunk aesthetics with contrasting teal and pink neon lighting against deep shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris

events.description: dialogue choice UI appears on screen displaying conversation option 'Sounds fine by me'
approaching the brightly lit exit at the end of the dark alley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley toward the exit where two figures are standing

notable_agents.action: two figures standing at the alley exit facing toward the camera

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in teal and white graffiti tags running along the right side
closed metal security shutter on the left wall
trash, cardboard, and litter scattered across the concrete floor
overhead fluorescent light fixture illuminating the alley exit

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow, dark service alley with graffiti-covered concrete walls and debris scattered on the floor. The space is enclosed with no visible sky, lit only by artificial fluorescent lights. Two NPCs stand at the far end near the exit as a dialogue choice UI briefly appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown plaza with neon corporate signage and tropical planters

events.description: exits the narrow alley into the open urban plaza with tall buildings and neon lights
large neon billboards and corporate towers become fully visible in the plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing forward into the neon-lit plaza, approaching the corporate buildings and passing by tropical planters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement sign with red and white graphics on the building facade
tall skyscraper with geometric red and white architectural patterns and glass windows
tropical palm trees in large rectangular planters
modern street light with red fixture illuminating the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the dark alley into a wide-open downtown plaza bathed in neon light. Tall corporate buildings with illuminated billboards dominate the view, while palm trees in planters line the walkway. The environment shifts from enclosed and dim to open and vibrantly lit with cyberpunk neon aesthetics.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, dark service alley into a sprawling, neon-drenched downtown plaza. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor of graffiti-covered concrete and scattered debris, where the view is enclosed and lit only by flickering fluorescent lights. As the camera approaches two figures standing at the alley's exit, a dialogue interface briefly appears before the space suddenly opens up. The scene then shifts from the dim shadows into a vibrant urban expanse dominated by towering corporate buildings and glowing billboards. Finally, the environment expands fully into the brightly lit plaza, where the oppressive concrete walls are replaced by open walkways lined with palm trees under a canopy of cyberpunk neon.
